targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', created_at) AS time, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE passed = true) AS passed, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE passed = false) AS failed FROM learning_judgments WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE passed = true) AS passed, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE passed = false) AS failed FROM learning_judgments WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY agent_id ORDER BY failed DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT date_trunc('hour', created_at) AS time, model_name, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p50_ms, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p95_ms FROM model_telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT operation, COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE success = false) AS errors, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE success = false) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS error_rate_pct FROM model_telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY operation ORDER BY error_rate_pct DESC

panels.title: RAG Query Quality — Relevance Score Trend

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', created_at) AS time, AVG(relevance_score) AS avg_relevance, AVG(response_quality) AS avg_rating FROM rag_query_feedback WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE response_quality IS NOT NULL) AS rated, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE response_quality IS NULL) AS unrated FROM rag_query_feedback WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)

SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN reranker_used THEN response_quality END) AS with_reranker, AVG(CASE WHEN NOT reranker_used THEN response_quality END) AS without_reranker FROM rag_query_feedback WHERE response_quality IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, agent_id, method, COUNT(*) AS optimizations FROM learning_optimizations WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1, 2, 3 ORDER BY 1

SELECT t.test_name, t.agent_id, t.metric_name, t.status, t.winner, COUNT(o.id) AS observations, AVG(CASE WHEN o.variant = 'a' THEN o.metric_value END) AS avg_variant_a, AVG(CASE WHEN o.variant = 'b' THEN o.metric_value END) AS avg_variant_b FROM ab_tests t LEFT JOIN ab_test_observations o ON o.test_id = t.id GROUP BY t.id, t.test_name, t.agent_id, t.metric_name, t.status, t.winner ORDER BY t.created_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT model_name, SUM(COALESCE(input_tokens, 0) + COALESCE(output_tokens, 0)) AS total_tokens FROM model_telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY model_name ORDER BY total_tokens DESC
